summary.en: Republic Act No. 11697, the Electric Vehicle Industry Development Act, establishes the Philippines EV policy framework and includes charging-station and charging-infrastructure obligations for covered participants. For an imported charger, the product file should be separated from the site file: equipment safety evidence supports the installation, while DOE / local permitting, operation, tariffs, service rules, and designated charging-station obligations belong to the operator and project approval path.
summary.zh: 菲律宾共和国法第11697号《电动汽车产业发展法》（EVIDA）建立了菲律宾电动汽车政策框架，并对适用主体规定了充电站和充电基础设施义务。对于进口充电桩，应将产品文件与站点文件分开：设备安全证据支持安装，而 DOE / 地方许可、运营、电价、服务规则和指定充电站义务属于运营方和项目审批路径。
summary.zht: 菲律賓共和國法第11697號《電動汽車產業發展法》（EVIDA）建立了菲律賓電動汽車政策框架，並對適用主體規定了充電站和充電基礎設施義務。對於進口充電樁，應將產品文件與站點文件分開：設備安全證據支持安裝，而 DOE / 地方許可、營運、電價、服務規則和指定充電站義務屬於營運方和項目審批路徑。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 11697 - Electric Vehicle Industry Development Act
DOE EVIDA implementing rules and charging-station guidance where applicable

summary.en: China charger documentation commonly focuses on GB/T 18487 technical safety, GB/T 20234 connection devices, GB/T 27930 DC communication, factory quality records, and domestic installation practice. Those documents do not replace Philippines EVIDA charging-station obligations or DOE / local project requirements.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩文件通常侧重 GB/T 18487 技术安全、GB/T 20234 连接装置、GB/T 27930 直流通信、工厂质量记录和国内安装实践。这些文件不能替代菲律宾 EVIDA 充电站义务或 DOE / 地方项目要求。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁文件通常側重 GB/T 18487 技術安全、GB/T 20234 連接裝置、GB/T 27930 直流通訊、工廠品質記錄和國內安裝實務。這些文件不能替代菲律賓 EVIDA 充電站義務或 DOE / 地方項目要求。

gap.en: A charger test report is not a DOE charging-station approval. The Philippines project package should include operator responsibilities, site layout, electrical single-line drawings, metering and tariff assumptions, emergency shutdown and maintenance procedures, accessibility / user information where required, and evidence requested by the local government unit, utility, DOE, or ERC route.
gap.zh: 充电桩测试报告并不等同于 DOE 充电站批准。菲律宾项目资料包应包括运营方责任、站点布置、电气单线图、计量和电价假设、紧急停机和维护程序、适用时的无障碍/用户信息，以及地方政府、电力公司、DOE 或 ERC 路径要求的证据。
gap.zht: 充電樁測試報告並不等同於 DOE 充電站批准。菲律賓項目資料包應包括營運方責任、站點佈置、電氣單線圖、計量和電價假設、緊急停機和維護程序、適用時的無障礙/用戶資訊，以及地方政府、電力公司、DOE 或 ERC 路徑要求的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for covered EVIDA charging-station participants and projects; not a blanket statement that every imported charger model has whole-unit BPS certification
mandatory_status.cn: China product standards and installation approvals apply domestically but do not replace Philippines EVIDA project obligations

source.publisher: Official Gazette of the Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EVIDA is a Philippines project and operating-framework gap. Separate the product compliance file from the charging-station permit, operator, utility, and service-rule file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EVIDA 属于菲律宾项目和运营框架差距。应将产品合规文件与充电站许可、运营方、电力公司和服务规则文件分开管理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EVIDA 屬於菲律賓項目和營運框架差距。應將產品合規文件與充電站許可、營運方、電力公司和服務規則文件分開管理。
